subject: Rhyhorn, a stocky grey rhinoceros-like Pokémon, resting in a sunny rocky landscape
description: A compact, heavily armored grey Pokémon with a prominent single horn on its snout rests low to the ground in a sunlit rocky or arid outdoor setting. Small white flowers or low vegetation are visible at ground level near the creature. The background shows a bright sky with warm golden light and possibly distant hills or cliffs. The creature looks solidly planted and unhurried.
foreground: stocky grey armored Pokémon with single horn resting on rocky ground with small flowers
background: sunny rocky landscape with bright sky
